# Ma Pools Construction

> Director-led pool construction, renovation, equipment installation, repairs, and ongoing care for homes and businesses across Gauteng. Plus paving, tiling, ceiling, plumbing, and garden services. Based in Meadowlands, Soweto.

Ma Pools Construction is a Gauteng-based pool construction and care business led by founding director Mkhacani Amos Chauke. We operate from 331B Utekwane Street, Zone 7, Meadowlands (Soweto) and service homes and businesses across Soweto, Johannesburg, Roodepoort, Krugersdorp, and surrounding Gauteng suburbs. The business covers the full pool lifecycle, new builds, renovations, marblite and fiberglass finishing, plumbing, motor pump and timer installation, filter sand changes, jacuzzi installation and leak repair, fish ponds, and pool covers, alongside complementary trades including paving, floor tiles, ceiling installation, house and office plumbing, and garden services. Quotes are free. WhatsApp 065 643 0603 is the fastest way to reach us.

---

## Home (/)

### Pool builds, repairs, and care across Gauteng.

Director-led pool construction, renovation, equipment installation, and ongoing care, plus paving, tiling, plumbing, and garden services. Servicing all of Gauteng from our base in Meadowlands, Soweto.

We handle the whole pool lifecycle: new builds, renovations, equipment, plumbing, repairs, and regular service. Plus paving, tiling, ceiling, and garden work, one contractor, one director, one accountable quote.

### What we do

From the first dig to the last filter sand change. New pool construction, renovations, marblite, fiberglass, fish ponds, pool covers, jacuzzi installation and leak repair, pool plumbing, motor pump installation and repair, pool heating systems, timers, filter sand replacement, and regular pool services. Plus paving, floor tiles, ceiling installation, house and office plumbing, and garden services.

### One contractor, one director

Whether you're building a new pool, renovating an old one, fixing a leaking pump, or just need the filter sand changed, we handle it. One contractor for your pool, your paving, and your plumbing. Direct line to the director.

---

## Services (/services.html)

### Pool builds, renovations, repairs, and care.

From new construction through to filter changes and pump repairs, Ma Pools Construction handles every stage of pool ownership across Gauteng. Plus paving, tiling, ceiling, plumbing, and garden services. Director-led, fixed quotes, accountable timelines.

### Pool Construction & Renovation

- New pool construction
- Pool renovations
- Marblite finishing
- Fiberglass installation
- Pool covers, supply and installation
- Fish pond construction

### Pool Equipment & Plumbing

- Pool heating systems
- Pool plumbing installation
- Motor pump installation
- Pool pump repair
- Filter sand replacement
- Timer installation

### Jacuzzi & Pool Care

- Jacuzzi installation
- Jacuzzi leak repair
- Pool services and regular maintenance

### Beyond the Pool

- Paving (driveway, patio, pool deck)
- Floor tiles
- Ceiling installation
- House plumbing
- Office plumbing
- Garden services

### How we quote

Send us a WhatsApp, an email, or fill in the booking form. The director comes back to you within one business day, in writing, with a fixed quote and a timeline.

---

## Gallery (/gallery.html)

### Selected work

A selection of pool builds, renovations, and installations completed by Ma Pools Construction across Gauteng. Project photography is being added as we publish each completed job.

Project types featured: new pool builds, lap pools, family pools and decks, pool renovations, mosaic and tile finish detail, garden integration, and full pool deck installations.

## Testimonials (/testimonials.html)

### Building a track record.

Ma Pools Construction is a working pool construction and maintenance business serving Gauteng. We let our work speak first and publish verified customer feedback here as it comes in. If we've worked on your pool, paving, plumbing, or jacuzzi, we'd be grateful for your honest review on Google.

---

## Book / Get a Quote (/book.html)

### Free quote in one business day

Tell us about your project, pool, paving, plumbing, jacuzzi, anything. We'll come back with a quote within one business day. WhatsApp is fastest.

The form captures:
- Full name
- Address (suburb / city)
- Pool type (Infinity / Lap / Fibreglass / Concrete-Marblite, or describe)
- Service required (New build / Renovation / Pump or equipment / Regular service)
- Notes / specific concerns
- Contact details

The director, Mkhacani Amos Chauke, responds personally within one business day.

---

## About (/about.html)

### Built by hand. Run by the director.

Ma Pools Construction is a Soweto-based pool and construction business led by founding director Mkhacani Amos Chauke. We service homes and businesses across Gauteng, from new pool builds and renovations to plumbing, paving, and ongoing pool care.

### How we work

Ma Pools Construction is built around one idea: one contractor handles the whole job. New build, renovation, equipment, repair, regular service, plus paving, tiling, ceiling, plumbing, and garden work. Everything stays under one roof, accountable to the director. We say what we'll charge, we say when we'll arrive, and we don't hand off your job to anyone you didn't meet.

### Director-led

Every project at Ma Pools Construction is led personally by Mkhacani Amos Chauke. New build or filter sand change, same accountability.

---

## Contact

- WhatsApp (messages only): +27 65 643 0603, https://wa.me/27656430603
- Voice calls: +27 78 712 2157
- Email: mapoolsconstruction@gmail.com
- Office: 331B Utekwane Street, Zone 7, Meadowlands, 1852, Soweto, Gauteng, South Africa
- Director: Mkhacani Amos Chauke

## Service Areas

- Soweto: Meadowlands, Diepkloof, Orlando, Pimville, Dobsonville, Naledi, Protea Glen
- Johannesburg
- Roodepoort
- Krugersdorp
- Lenasia, Eldorado Park
- Florida and surrounding West Rand suburbs
- All of Gauteng on request

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/privacy.html): POPIA-aligned policy covering form submissions, data retention, and data subject rights.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.mapoolsconstruction.co.za/terms.html): Service terms, booking and cancellation policy, liability limits, and South African governing law.
